# DexThemes — Full Theme Catalog

> This file contains the complete theme catalog for LLM/agent consumption.
> For the summary version, see /llms.txt

Total themes: 111

## API Endpoints

- Browse all themes: GET https://dexthemes.com/api/themes
- Published docs: https://dexthemes.com/llms.txt and https://dexthemes.com/.well-known/openapi.json
- Generate random: GET https://acrobatic-corgi-867.convex.site/api/color-me-lucky?variant=dark|light
- Deep link: https://dexthemes.com/?theme={id}&variant=dark|light

## Theme Catalog

### Codex
- ID: `codex`
- Deep link: https://dexthemes.com/?theme=codex
- Dark: surface=#111111 ink=#fcfcfc accent=#0169cc
- Light: surface=#ffffff ink=#0d0d0d accent=#0169cc

- Light: surface=#FFF3F8 ink=#2A1F27 accent=#DB2777
